## Checklist

For new entries:

- [ ] Has documented work or recognized impact in the field
- [ ] Includes at least one primary public source
- [ ] Description is factual and short — no promotional language
- [ ] Placed in the correct section of README.md

For corrections:

- [ ] Describes what changed and why (broken link, outdated source, duplicate)
